title: Add search filter to dashboard and delete resolved incidents in admin panel

requirements.summary: Add a search/filter input to the public-facing Dashboard that filters displayed incidents by keyword in real time
acceptanceCriteria: A search input field is visible on the Dashboard above the incident sections
Typing in the search field filters incidents in real time without a page reload
Filtering matches against incident title, affected system/service, and description
Both the active and resolved incident sections are filtered by the same search term
When no incidents match the search term, a 'no results' message is shown
When the search field is cleared, all incidents are shown again

file_operations.description: Add a controlled search input above the incident list sections. Implement client-side filtering logic using useMemo to filter incidents array based on search term matching against title, affectedService, and description fields. Apply the same filter to both active and resolved incident sections. Display a 'No incidents match your search' message when the filtered arrays are empty and search term is not empty. Use the shadcn-ui Input component for the search field.

requirements.summary: Add a delete button to each resolved incident in the Admin Panel with confirmation dialog
acceptanceCriteria: A delete button is visible on resolved incidents in the Admin Panel
No delete button appears on non-resolved incidents
Clicking the delete button shows a confirmation prompt before proceeding
Confirming the deletion calls deleteIncident and removes the incident
After deletion, the incident list in the admin panel and dashboard is updated immediately
A useDeleteIncident mutation hook exists in useQueries.ts and invalidates the getAllIncidents cache on success

file_operations.description: Add a useDeleteIncident mutation hook that calls the backend deleteIncident function with an incident ID. On successful deletion, invalidate the 'incidents' query key to refresh the getAllIncidents cache. Handle the DeleteIncidentResult enum variants (success, notFound, notResolved) and return appropriate success/error states to the UI.

Add a new 'Delete Resolved' tab that displays all resolved incidents from the getAllIncidents query. For each resolved incident, render an IncidentCard with a delete button. Wire the delete button to open a shadcn-ui AlertDialog for confirmation. On confirmation, call the useDeleteIncident mutation. Display success/error toast notifications based on mutation result. Use the shadcn-ui AlertDialog component for the confirmation prompt.
